Apple___Apple_scab.symptoms: Olive-green to dark brown velvety spots on leaves and fruits. Leaves may curl and drop early. Fruits develop scabby lesions.
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply protective fungicides such as mancozeb or captan during early leaf stage and repeat during wet weather.
Apple___Apple_scab.dosage: 2–3 grams per liter of water at 7–10 day intervals.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Remove fallen infected leaves, prune for airflow, and avoid overhead irrigation.

Apple___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown circular spots on leaves, fruit rot with concentric rings, and branch cankers.
Apple___Black_rot.treatment: Apply broad-spectrum fungicides such as thiophanate-methyl or mancozeb.
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Remove mummified fruits and infected branches. Maintain orchard sanitation.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.symptoms: Bright orange-yellow spots on leaves. Galls may form on nearby juniper plants.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Use systemic fungicides at pink bud and petal fall stage.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.dosage: 1–2 ml or 2–3 grams per liter depending on product.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Remove alternate host plants and maintain orchard hygiene.

Apple___healthy.symptoms: No visible disease symptoms. Leaves are green and normal.
Apple___healthy.prevention: Maintain balanced nutrition, irrigation, and regular monitoring.

Blueberry___healthy.symptoms: Plant appears healthy with no disease symptoms.
Blueberry___healthy.prevention: Maintain proper irrigation and soil acidity.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery growth on leaves and shoots. Leaves may curl and distort.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur-based or systemic fungicides at early infection.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Ensure good air circulation and avoid excess nitrogen.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.symptoms: Rectangular gray lesions between leaf veins.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.treatment: Apply fungicides at early infection stage.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.dosage: 2–3 grams per liter as per label.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.treatment: Apply triazole fungicides at early stage.
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.dosage: 1–2 ml per liter depending on product.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.symptoms: Long cigar-shaped gray lesions on leaves.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.treatment: Apply protective fungicides when symptoms appear.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Crop rotation and proper field sanitation.

Grape___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown leaf spots and shriveled black berries.
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Prune infected vines and improve airflow.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).symptoms: Interveinal yellowing and dark spots on berries.
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: Remove infected wood. No fully effective chemical cure.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.symptoms: Brown circular leaf spots that enlarge.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).symptoms: Yellowing of leaves, misshapen fruits, and stunted growth.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).treatment: No cure available. Remove infected trees.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Control psyllid vector and use certified disease-free plants.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark lesions on leaves and fruits.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Water-soaked spots that turn brown with yellow halo.

Potato___Early_blight.symptoms: Concentric dark rings on older leaves.

Potato___Late_blight.symptoms: Large dark lesions on leaves and tuber rot.

Soybean___healthy.symptoms: Healthy green leaves with no lesions.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.symptoms: Small purple spots that enlarge and turn brown.
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.dosage: 2–3 grams per liter at 7–10 day intervals.
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Improve air circulation and avoid overhead irrigation.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark lesions with yellow halo on leaves.

Tomato___Early_blight.symptoms: Target-like concentric rings on older leaves.

Tomato___Late_blight.symptoms: Large dark water-soaked lesions on leaves.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.symptoms: Yellow patches on upper leaf surface with mold underneath.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.symptoms: Small circular spots with gray centers.

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.symptoms: Fine webbing and yellow speckling on leaves.
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.prevention: Maintain field hygiene and monitor regularly.

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.symptoms: Leaf curling, yellowing, and stunted growth.
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.dosage: Use recommended insecticides as per label.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.symptoms: Mosaic pattern on leaves and distorted growth.
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.prevention: Disinfect tools and use certified seeds.

Tomato___healthy.symptoms: Plant appears healthy with no disease.
